chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: : رَأَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَأْكُلُ مُتَّكِئاً ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَ "مَا أَكَلَ مُتَّكِئاً حَتَّى مَاتَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4248 - It is narrated from Umar ibn Abi Shu'bah who said:
"I saw Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) eating while reclining.
Then Imam (as) mentioned the Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, and said: 'He never ate while reclining until he passed away.' "
